description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Clang-Tidy Check that runs on every pull request. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest, checking out the repository with recursive submodules. Restore Qt from cache or install it, set up the Qt environment, and install clang-tidy for Linux and macOS. Enable the Developer Command Prompt on Windows, configure CMake with clang-tidy enabled, and build the project.
